topic: Postpartum hormone crash: what really happens
caption: 🚨 Did you know that 80% of new moms experience a postpartum hormone crash? 💔 It's time to talk about what really happens after birth. 🤰‍♀️ From plummeting estrogen to soaring cortisol, we're breaking down the science behind this sudden shift. 🧬 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future self will thank you. 💕 #postpartumhealth #hormonecrash #newmom
